name: Coverage Report Agent
description: Generates comprehensive analyst coverage initiation reports with industry analysis, company deep-dive, multi-methodology valuation framework, and formatted research reports. Orchestrates multi-pass workflows delegating to specialized worker agents for comp analysis, DCF modeling, and precedent transactions.
